meta.title: Las Fuertes - Something Powerful is Coming
meta.description: We are building a space for Comprehensive Menstrual Education (CME) to mark a new milestone in Colombia.

hero.subtitle1: Even though you can't see it yet, what's coming

section2.paragraph: Silence, ignorance, and disinformation have for years created **habits, walls and barriers that float in violent and discriminatory realities for girls as they grow.**

section3.title: A topic so natural, historically ignored, why talk about it now?
section3.text: The dignity and rights of girls and adolescents are like seawater, they never expire, and in **Las Fuertes** we embark on this irreversible mission with a unique educational map, breaking down walls and barriers.

welcome.subtitle: from Isla Fuerte, Colombia
welcome.body: A space where **comprehensive menstrual education** becomes a tool for transformation; here we accompany girls and adolescents to know, understand, and **live their cycle with freedom and confidence.**
welcome.emiTitle: Comprehensive menstrual education as a map for change
welcome.emiParagraph1: From that attentive listening and the desire to move new tides, **EMI** is born—our **Comprehensive Menstrual Education** program.
welcome.emiParagraph2: A living proposal, woven from experience in Isla Fuerte and other territories in Colombia; here we understood that menstrual education is not enough on its own: **we need a broad vision** of integrity that allows every girl to inhabit her body with freedom and pride.

content.intro: We are building a space for {emi} to mark a new milestone in Colombia.
content.since: Since 2021, Las Fuertes has created safe spaces where information breaks down barriers of silence and transforms lives.
content.thanks: Thank you for being here. Follow us and be part of the change.

cta.button: I want to be part of the change
cta.subtitle: Contact us and join the CME revolution

modal.title: Contact Us
modal.description: Tell us what interests you about Las Fuertes or Comprehensive Menstrual Education

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what interests you about Las Fuertes or CME...

success.title: Message sent!
success.message: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you soon.

modal.error: There was an error sending the message. Please try again.

principles.title: How we came to understand it:

donations.paragraph1: Turn your money into **collective action**. More valuable than any investment because it takes us to new destinations while deepening our impact.
donations.paragraph2: Every contribution creates a wave... and your constant support shapes currents of change and new opportunities.

hero.title: Join Las Fuertes
hero.subtitle: Every girl on Isla Fuerte deserves tools to build her future. You can be part of that today, from wherever you are.

proyecto.label: Our project right now
proyecto.title: Comprehensive Menstrual Education on Isla Fuerte
proyecto.description: Through EMI we support girls and teenagers on the island so they can understand and live their cycle with freedom and confidence. Your support becomes workshops, materials and safe spaces.

unica.title: Give once
unica.text: Your contribution turns directly into workshops, materials and opportunities for the girls on the island. You choose how much.
unica.error: We couldn't open the payment right now. You can try again or use a direct transfer.
unica.readyHint: Your payment is ready: complete it with the Bold button. You can pay with credit or debit card (including international cards), PSE or the Bancolombia button.

mensual.title: Give monthly
mensual.text: A fixed monthly contribution gives stability to the foundation's programs. It's the most powerful way to help, because it lets us plan ahead.
mensual.fallback: Prefer Nequi? Set up a recurring payment from your app to {number}.

especie.title: Your things can change a story
especie.text: On the island there are no tech shops or big stationery stores. What is no longer useful to you opens doors here. We receive:
especie.item3: School supplies, notebooks and art materials
especie.item4: Children's and young adult books in Spanish
especie.cta: I want to donate in kind
especie.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want to make an in-kind donation to Las Fuertes.

llegue.title: The Llegue-Llegue: shopping with purpose
llegue.text: At our headquarters on Isla Fuerte we run the Llegue-Llegue, our mini second-hand clothing store of good quality. Every garment sold directly supports the foundation's programs.
llegue.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want to donate clothes for the Llegue-Llegue.
llegue.donateNote: To shop you have to visit us on the island, but from anywhere you can donate clothes in good condition and give the store more stock.

voluntariado.title: Share what you know, from wherever you are
voluntariado.text: You don't need to be on the island or be a teacher to help. If you have a skill, you have something to give. We're looking for remote support in:
voluntariado.commitment: Flexible: you decide how much time you can give.
voluntariado.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want to be a remote volunteer for Las Fuertes.

difunde.title: Spread the word
difunde.text: Can't donate yet? You can still help: follow us on Instagram, where we share everything we do; share our work; and tell someone who has an unused laptop or camera stored away.

sumate.whatsappUnavailable: Very soon you'll be able to reach us here.

wizard.question: How do you want to help?

usa.title: Donating from the United States?
usa.text: Only if you're in the USA: you can give in dollars —once or monthly— through our partner Caring for Colombia, and your donation is tax-deductible there. Giving from any other country? Use the form above with your international card.

gracias.approvedText: Your contribution went through and will become workshops, materials and opportunities for the girls of Isla Fuerte. You'll receive Bold's receipt by email.
gracias.pendingText: Your transaction is pending confirmation (this is normal with PSE). Bold will send you the receipt once it's approved.
gracias.rejectedText: Your transaction was declined or cancelled and nothing was charged. You can try again or write to us if you need help.
gracias.suscripcionText: Your monthly contribution gives stability to Las Fuertes' programs and lets us plan ahead. Mercado Pago will email you the receipt for each charge, and you can manage or cancel your subscription from your Mercado Pago account at any time.
gracias.shareText: I just supported Las Fuertes, a foundation providing Comprehensive Menstrual Education to girls on Isla Fuerte. Join in:

footer.tagline: Comprehensive Menstrual Education from Isla Fuerte, Colombia.
footer.legal: Fundación Las Fuertes · Isla Fuerte, Bolívar, Colombia
footer.madeWith: Made with love from the island.
